title: ehretia cymosa var. silvatica
intro: Ehretia cymosa var. silvatica, commonly known as the forest ehretia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, where it is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is also used to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Ehretia cymosa var. silvatica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make capsules and tablets.
